content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: Opinion Request File

Date: June 4, 1981

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
Barbara A. Milman

Subject: May 26, 1981 Opinion Request
Section 87207

Under 87207(a)(1) a filer must report a pro-rata share of the gross income of any business entity or trust in which the individual or spouse owns a 10-percent or greater interest.

BAM:gs

Filed: 87207
82030

Section 87207

Under 87207(a)(1) a filer must report a pro-rata share of the gross income of any business entity or trust in which the individual or spouse owns a 10-percent or greater interest.

BAM:gs

82030

sections.conclusion: Under 87207(a)(1) a filer must report a pro-rata share of the gross income of any business entity or trust in which the individual or spouse owns a 10-percent or greater interest.
sections.question_synthetic: How must a filer report their pro-rata share of gross income from a business entity or trust in which they hold a 10% or greater interest?
sections.conclusion_synthetic: Under Government Code Section 87207(a)(1), a filer must report their pro-rata share of gross income from any business entity or trust in which they or their spouse own 10% or greater interest.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Minimal document structure; no formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections found. The substantive guidance appears to be the single paragraph statement regarding Section 87207(a)(1) requirements. Dated memorandum format rather than traditional advice letter format.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: How must a filer report their pro-rata share of gross income from a business entity or trust in which they hold a 10% or greater interest?

CONCLUSION: Under 87207(a)(1) a filer must report a pro-rata share of the gross income of any business entity or trust in which the individual or spouse owns a 10-percent or greater interest.
embedding.first_500_words: **Memorandum** To: Opinion Request File Date: June 4, 1981 From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION Barbara A. Milman Subject: May 26, 1981 Opinion Request Section 87207 Under 87207(a)(1) a filer must report a pro-rata share of the gross income of any business entity or trust in which the individual or spouse owns a 10-percent or greater interest. BAM:gs Filed: 87207 82030
embedding.summary: This FPPC memorandum addresses an opinion request dated May 26, 1981 regarding income reporting requirements under Section 87207. The Commission advises that a filer must report their pro-rata share of gross income from business entities or trusts in which they hold a 10% or greater interest.
